name: Prohibition
tips: Save this for high-value magic cards like Dark Matter Stash or Ratical Resurrection. Negating a 1-mana Shady Trade Deal with a 4-mana Prohibition is a losing trade.
The threat of Prohibition is often as valuable as playing it. If your opponent knows you have Water mana open, they may delay their key spells.
At 4 mana, this is expensive to hold up. Try to plan turns where you can play a minion or attack AND still have 4 mana in reserve.
Does not stop minion summons or activated abilities. Against creature-heavy decks like Rats or Robots, this card may be a dead draw.
Against Dark Mage decks, negating Dark Matter Stash is devastating — it wastes their 5 mana AND denies the DM buff that their entire strategy depends on.
rulings: Can only be played in the react window immediately after your opponent plays a magic card.
Negates the opponent's magic card entirely — all of its effects are cancelled and it is sent to the exhaust pile.
Costs 4 mana to play. If you don't have 4 mana available during the react window, you cannot use it.
Does not negate minion summons, react cards, or activated abilities — only magic cards.
